results.name: happy_path
results.claim: Bot reports, operator unseals, verifier accepts

results.name: wrong_operator_cannot_decrypt
results.claim: Sealed report cannot be decrypted by anyone except intended operator

results.name: tampered_payload
results.claim: Modifying report.payload after signing must fail verification

results.name: forged_sender_signature
results.claim: Report signed by a different agent's key must be rejected

results.name: replay_blocked
results.claim: Same report verified twice must be blocked on second use

results.name: expired_credential
results.claim: Report from an expired credential must be rejected at verify time

results.name: revoked_credential
results.claim: Bot whose credential is revoked cannot create new reports

results.name: non_agent_cannot_report
results.claim: Users (non-agents) cannot create reports — only agents can
